summary: Local structural, unit, build, MCP, and vulnerability checks pass. Live Amazon Ads auth/API dogfood is pending a refresh token.

checks.name: govulncheck
checks.notes: No vulnerabilities found in called code or imported packages; one vulnerability exists in a required module that is not called.

checks.name: doctor
checks.notes: Config OK and Amazon Ads host reachable, but auth is not configured until AMAZON_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN is minted or supplied. The auth hint now points to auth login --port 8085 and the localhost callback URL.

checks.name: mcp-stdio-smoke
checks.notes: JSON-RPC initialize succeeds; tools/list returns 53 tools and includes auto_negate.

checks.name: mcp-manifest-counts
checks.notes: .printing-press.json advertises the runtime MCP surface: 53 total/public tools. Static tools-manifest.json remains endpoint metadata for the code-orchestration search/execute path.

checks.name: local-novel-command-smoke
checks.notes: Sample CSV/TOML inputs produced structured JSON for dashboard totals, ACOS/TACOS, wasted-spend recommendations, search-term mining recommendations, true-profit, and break-even ACOS without live Amazon credentials.

checks.name: live-auth-login
checks.notes: Requires Amazon developer redirect URL http://localhost:8085/callback and user authorization.

checks.name: auth-guidance
checks.command: go run ./cmd/amazon-ads-pp-cli auth setup && go run ./cmd/amazon-ads-pp-cli doctor --json
checks.notes: auth setup prints http://localhost:8085/callback and auth login --port 8085; doctor emits the same callback-aware login hint when the refresh token is missing.

checks.name: live-profile-list
checks.notes: Requires a real refresh token and authorized advertising profile.

checks.name: publish-package-verifier-simulation
checks.notes: Simulated a new library/commerce/amazon-ads PR in a temporary git repo; verifier selected one new CLI and passed.

checks.name: registry-generation-simulation
checks.notes: Simulated the public catalog with the local CLI overlaid at library/commerce/amazon-ads. Validation passed, the generated registry entry uses Amazon-specific description/search terms, and MCP metadata remains 53 total/public tools.

checks.name: binary-payload-verifier-simulation
checks.notes: No newly added or modified MCPB/native binary payloads under library/.

checks.name: supply-chain-scan-simulation
checks.notes: No findings for the public-library Go module path.
